label: LIFO reserve, year-end
notes: Anchored verbatim in plan Quick Source Anchors and upstream claims pack.

label: LIFO reserve, prior year-end
notes: Comparative-year value from FY2025 10-K LIFO note required to compute LIFO charge.

label: LIFO charge (period change in LIFO reserve)
notes: Computed as lifo_reserve_FY2025 minus lifo_reserve_FY2024.

label: Effective income tax rate
notes: From FY2025 10-K Income Taxes note effective-rate reconciliation; floor 21% per S-010.

label: Reported pre-tax income (LIFO basis)
notes: From the consolidated income statement of the FY2025 10-K.

label: Reported net earnings (LIFO basis)
notes: From the consolidated income statement of the FY2025 10-K.

label: Reported operating income
notes: Used as the EBITDA starting point before D&A add-back.

label: Depreciation and amortization
notes: From the consolidated cash-flow statement of the FY2025 10-K.

label: Reported EBITDA
notes: Operating income plus D&A; LIFO basis.

label: FIFO-adjusted pre-tax income
notes: reported_pretax_income + lifo_charge.

label: FIFO-adjusted net earnings
notes: reported_net_earnings + lifo_charge * (1 - effective_tax_rate).

label: FIFO-adjusted EBITDA
notes: reported_ebitda + lifo_charge. Pre-tax bridge by definition.

label: FIFO-adjusted diluted EPS
notes: fifo_net_earnings divided by Class A + Class B diluted shares.

label: Inventories, net (LIFO basis)
notes: From the consolidated balance sheet of the FY2025 10-K.

label: FIFO inventory adjustment (gross)
notes: Identically the FY2025 LIFO reserve.

label: FIFO inventory adjustment (after-tax)
notes: 359.3 * (1 - effective_tax_rate).

label: Total current assets
notes: From the consolidated balance sheet of the FY2025 10-K.

label: Total liabilities
notes: Sum of current and long-term liabilities.

label: Total stockholders' equity
notes: From the consolidated balance sheet of the FY2025 10-K.

label: Goodwill
notes: From the consolidated balance sheet of the FY2025 10-K.

label: Other intangible assets, net
notes: From the consolidated balance sheet of the FY2025 10-K.

label: Tangible book value (reported, LIFO basis)
notes: reported_stockholders_equity - reported_goodwill - reported_other_intangibles.

label: Tangible book value, FIFO-adjusted (pre-tax)
notes: tangible_book_reported + 359.3.

label: Tangible book value, FIFO-adjusted (after deferred tax)
notes: tangible_book_reported + 359.3 * (1 - effective_tax_rate).

label: FIFO-adjusted tangible book per share
notes: tangible_book_fifo_aftertax / (Class A + Class B shares).

label: NCAV (reported, LIFO basis)
notes: reported_total_current_assets - reported_total_liabilities.

label: NCAV, FIFO-adjusted (pre-tax)
notes: ncav_reported + 359.3.

label: NCAV, FIFO-adjusted (after deferred tax)
notes: ncav_reported + 359.3 * (1 - effective_tax_rate).

label: FIFO-adjusted NCAV per share
notes: ncav_fifo_aftertax / (Class A + Class B shares).

label: Short-term debt and current portion of long-term debt
notes: From the consolidated balance sheet of the FY2025 10-K.

label: Long-term debt and finance leases
notes: From the balance sheet and long-term debt footnote.

label: Cash, cash equivalents, and marketable securities
notes: From the consolidated balance sheet of the FY2025 10-K.

label: Net debt
notes: (Short-term debt + Long-term debt) - (Cash + Marketable securities).

label: Class A common stock outstanding
notes: From the FY2025 10-K cover page.

label: Class B common stock outstanding
notes: From the FY2025 10-K cover page.

label: Cumulative buyback authorization (active program)
notes: From 10-K Item 5 / Item 7 and FY2025 proxy.

label: Shares repurchased in FY2025
notes: From 10-K Item 5 monthly repurchase table.

label: Average price paid per share repurchased
notes: From 10-K Item 5 monthly repurchase table.

label: Net buyback as percent of beginning shares outstanding
notes: (Shares repurchased - Shares issued for compensation) / Beginning shares outstanding.

label: Book value per share CAGR, FY2005-FY2025
notes: Both reported (LIFO) and FIFO-adjusted CAGRs computed.

label: SENEA Class A closing price on rebuild reference date
notes: Archive snapshot required for reproducibility.
